mapper.insert: insert into work_order_reminder(order_no, reminder_type, reminder_username, reminder_display_name, reminder_content, created_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{reminderType}, #{reminderUsername}, #{reminderDisplayName}, #{reminderContent}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select id, order_no, reminder_type, reminder_username, reminder_display_name, reminder_content, created_at from work_order_reminder where id = #{id}
select id, order_no, reminder_type, reminder_username, reminder_display_name, reminder_content, created_at from work_order_reminder where order_no = #{orderNo} order by created_at asc
select id, order_no, reminder_type, reminder_username, reminder_display_name, reminder_content, created_at from work_order_reminder where order_no = #{orderNo} order by created_at desc
select count(1) from work_order_reminder where order_no = #{orderNo}
